title: What is Azure Static Web Apps?
description: The key features and functionality of Azure Static Web Apps.
summary: Azure Static Web Apps is a service that automatically deploys full stack web apps to Azure from a code repository. The workflow of Azure Static Web Apps is tailored to a developer's daily workflow. Apps are built and deployed based on code changes. When you create an static web app, Azure interacts directly with GitHub or Azure DevOps to monitor a branch of your choice.
